controlSet.description: Require classification, consequence, coupling, delegation, reversibility, contestability, audit, oversight, and remediation fields.
Record boundary conditions and non-automatable decision classes.
Require evidence that material effects can be halted, corrected, or reversed.
Record the audit or assessment reference used to substantiate governance posture.

rules: Require classification, consequence, coupling, delegation, reversibility, contestability, audit, oversight, and remediation fields.
Record boundary conditions and non-automatable decision classes.
Require evidence that material effects can be halted, corrected, or reversed.
Record the audit or assessment reference used to substantiate governance posture.

threats.description: High-risk governance is asserted in narrative without testable evidence.
Protected decision classes and boundary conditions are not declared.
Challenge rights exist procedurally but not operationally.

transitions.trigger: supersession or replacement by stronger artifact

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as a legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
